meta.title: ClipQuiz — Guess from Clips, Images & Audio
meta.description: The global guessing game platform. Play image, crop & music quizzes. Beat the percentile. Go viral.

hero.title: Guess. Compete.
hero.subtitle: Image quizzes. Cropped close-ups. Type your answer, beat the crowd, and share your rank.

create.title: Create Your Quiz

create.answersHelp: Up to {max} accepted answers, one per line (spaces ignored when checking)

footer.disclaimer: Quiz images are used for educational and entertainment purposes. Trademarks belong to their respective owners.

editorial.title: Why ClipQuiz?
editorial.p1: ClipQuiz is a free online trivia platform where you guess answers from images, extreme close-up crops, and audio clips. Unlike multiple-choice quizzes, you type what you know — making every round feel like a real trivia night with friends.
editorial.p2: Our editorial team curates geography, nature, science, and culture quizzes using public-domain and licensed imagery. We publish guides, FAQs, and community standards so every visitor understands how the platform works before they play.
editorial.p3: Whether you are studying flags for a geography class, hosting a stream with viewers, or killing time on your commute, ClipQuiz offers dozens of hand-crafted quiz sets with percentile rankings so you can measure yourself against other players worldwide.

report.title: Report This Quiz
report.success: Thank you. The report was recorded and our automated systems will take action if needed.
report.error: Could not submit report. Please email jwon9798@gmail.com

cookies.message: We use cookies for site functionality and, with your consent, Google AdSense advertising. Third parties, including Google, may use cookies to serve ads.

sections.title: 1. Who We Are
sections.body:
ClipQuiz ("we", "us", "our") operates the website clipquiz.jwonlabs.com and related services. We provide a free online quiz platform where users play and create image and crop guessing quizzes.

Data controller contact: jwon9798@gmail.com

Operator location: South Korea

sections.title: 2. Information We Collect
sections.body:
We collect the following categories of data:

• Quiz content you create (title, description, images, answers, creator name)
• Quiz play results (score, quiz ID, timestamp)
• Technical data: IP address, browser type, device type, pages visited
• Cookies and similar technologies (see Section 5)

We do not require account registration. You may use a nickname when creating quizzes.

sections.title: 3. How We Use Your Data
sections.body:
We use collected data to:

• Operate and improve the quiz platform
• Display percentile rankings and play counts
• Store and display user-created quizzes
• Serve advertisements through Google AdSense (with your consent where required)
• Respond to support requests and content reports
• Prevent abuse and enforce our Terms of Service

Legal bases (GDPR): contract performance, legitimate interests, and consent (for advertising cookies).

sections.title: 4. Data Retention
sections.body: User-created quizzes are stored until you request deletion or we remove them for policy violations. Quiz result data is retained for ranking statistics. Server logs are retained for up to 90 days. Cookie consent preferences are stored in your browser until you clear them.

sections.title: 5. Cookies and Advertising
sections.body:
We use essential cookies for site functionality. With your consent, we use Google AdSense (Publisher ID: ca-pub-4911271163170466) to display advertisements.

Third-party vendors, including Google, use cookies to serve ads based on your prior visits to this and other websites. You may opt out of personalized advertising at:

• https://www.google.com/settings/ads
• https://www.aboutads.info

How Google uses data: https://policies.google.com/technologies/partner-sites

You can choose "Essential Only" in our cookie banner to decline advertising cookies.

sections.title: 6. Third-Party Services
sections.body:
We use the following third-party services:

• Google AdSense — advertising
• Cloudflare — website hosting and security
• Supabase — database hosting (when configured)

These providers process data according to their own privacy policies. We do not sell your personal information.

sections.title: 7. Your Rights
sections.body:
Depending on your location, you may have the right to:

• Access the personal data we hold about you
• Request correction or deletion of your data
• Object to or restrict certain processing
• Withdraw consent for advertising cookies
• Lodge a complaint with a supervisory authority

To exercise these rights, email jwon9798@gmail.com with your request and the quiz ID if applicable.

sections.title: 8. Children's Privacy
sections.body: ClipQuiz is not directed at children under 13. We do not knowingly collect personal information from children under 13. If you believe a child has provided us data, contact us and we will delete it promptly. Users aged 13–17 should have parental consent.

sections.title: 9. International Transfers
sections.body: Your data may be processed in countries outside your residence, including the United States and European Union, where our hosting and advertising providers operate. We rely on standard contractual clauses and provider safeguards where applicable.

sections.title: 10. Changes and Contact
sections.body:
We may update this policy periodically. The "Last updated" date at the top reflects the latest revision. Continued use after changes constitutes acceptance.

Questions: jwon9798@gmail.com

sections.title: 1. Acceptance of Terms
sections.body: By accessing or using ClipQuiz ("the Service"), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service, our Privacy Policy, Community Guidelines, and Copyright Policy. If you do not agree, do not use the Service.

sections.title: 2. Description of Service
sections.body: ClipQuiz provides free online guessing quizzes in image, crop, and audio formats. Users can play curated quizzes, view percentile rankings, and create their own quizzes without an account. The Service is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind, express or implied.

sections.title: 3. Eligibility
sections.body: You must be at least 13 years old to use ClipQuiz. Users between 13 and 17 must have parental or guardian consent. By using the Service, you represent that you meet these requirements.

sections.title: 4. User-Generated Content
sections.body:
When you create a quiz, you grant ClipQuiz a non-exclusive, worldwide, royalty-free license to host, display, and distribute your quiz content on the platform. You retain ownership of your original content.

Quizzes that pass automated validation are published immediately. You are solely responsible for quizzes you submit. You must not upload content that:

• Infringes copyrights, trademarks, or other intellectual property
• Contains hate speech, harassment, or threats
• Is sexually explicit or promotes violence
• Contains malware, spam, or misleading information
• Violates any applicable law

We may remove content automatically or at our discretion without prior notice.

sections.title: 5. Intellectual Property
sections.body:
ClipQuiz's name, logo, website design, and original seed quiz content are owned by ClipQuiz. Third-party trademarks, images, and media referenced in quizzes belong to their respective owners and are used for identification and educational purposes.

If you believe your copyright has been infringed, see our Copyright Policy or email jwon9798@gmail.com with a DMCA notice.

sections.title: 6. Prohibited Conduct
sections.body:
You agree not to:

• Use automated tools to scrape, spam, or overload the Service
• Attempt to gain unauthorized access to our systems
• Circumvent quiz mechanics or manipulate rankings
• Impersonate others or misrepresent your affiliation
• Use the Service for any unlawful purpose

sections.title: 7. Content Moderation
sections.body: User reports are processed automatically. Quizzes with multiple reports may be hidden or removed without manual review. Users can report quizzes via the in-app report button. Repeat violators may have quiz creation restricted.

sections.title: 8. Disclaimer of Warranties
sections.body: THE SERVICE IS PROVIDED "AS IS" AND "AS AVAILABLE." WE DISCLAIM ALL WARRANTIES, INCLUDING MERCHANTABILITY, FITNESS FOR A PARTICULAR PURPOSE, AND NON-INFRINGEMENT. WE DO NOT GUARANTEE UNINTERRUPTED OR ERROR-FREE OPERATION.

sections.title: 9. Limitation of Liability
sections.body: TO THE MAXIMUM EXTENT PERMITTED BY LAW, CLIPQUIZ SHALL NOT BE LIABLE FOR ANY INDIRECT, INCIDENTAL, SPECIAL, CONSEQUENTIAL, OR PUNITIVE DAMAGES ARISING FROM YOUR USE OF THE SERVICE. OUR TOTAL LIABILITY SHALL NOT EXCEED USD $100.

sections.title: 10. Termination
sections.body: We may suspend or terminate your access to the Service at any time for violation of these Terms. You may request deletion of your user-created quizzes by contacting jwon9798@gmail.com.

sections.title: 11. Governing Law
sections.body: These Terms are governed by the laws of the Republic of Korea, without regard to conflict of law principles. Disputes shall be resolved in the courts of Seoul, South Korea, unless mandatory consumer protection laws in your country require otherwise.

sections.title: 12. Contact
sections.body: Questions about these Terms: jwon9798@gmail.com

about.title: About ClipQuiz
about.intro: ClipQuiz is a global guessing game platform built for trivia lovers, streamers, and friend groups. Play image, crop, and audio quizzes in five languages — no account required.

sections.title: Our Mission
sections.body: We believe trivia should be fast, social, and skill-based. ClipQuiz lets you type your answers instead of picking from multiple choice, so your knowledge — not lucky guesses — determines your score. Percentile rankings show exactly how you compare to other players worldwide.

sections.title: What We Offer
sections.body:
• 24+ curated quiz sets covering geography, nature, science, art, and culture
• Three quiz modes: full image, extreme crop zoom, and audio clip
• User-created quizzes — build and share your own in minutes
• Percentile rankings and score sharing
• Support for English, Korean, Japanese, Spanish, and Portuguese
• Mobile-friendly design for play anywhere

sections.title: Our Content Standards
sections.body: Our editorial team creates original quiz sets using public-domain images, country flags, and Wikimedia Commons media. User quizzes publish automatically after passing validation; reports trigger automated hiding or removal.

sections.title: Publisher Information
sections.body:
ClipQuiz is operated by an independent developer based in South Korea. The platform is free to use and supported by advertising.

Contact: jwon9798@gmail.com
Website: clipquiz.jwonlabs.com

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: We welcome questions, feedback, partnership inquiries, and content reports. We aim to respond within 2 business days.

sections.title: General Inquiries
sections.body: For questions about how ClipQuiz works, feature requests, or press inquiries, email us at the address below.

sections.title: Content Reports
sections.body:
To report a quiz for copyright infringement, inappropriate content, or spam:

1. Use the "Report Quiz" button on any quiz page, OR
2. Email jwon9798@gmail.com with the quiz URL and reason

Reports are processed automatically. Quizzes may be hidden or removed when thresholds are reached.

sections.title: Copyright / DMCA
sections.body:
For copyright takedown requests, include:

• Your name and contact information
• Description of the copyrighted work
• URL of the infringing quiz on ClipQuiz
• A statement of good faith belief
• Your physical or electronic signature

Send to: jwon9798@gmail.com

sections.title: Privacy Requests
sections.body: To request access, correction, or deletion of your data or user-created quizzes, email jwon9798@gmail.com with the quiz ID and your request. We process GDPR and privacy requests within 30 days.

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.intro: Everything you need to know about playing, creating, and sharing quizzes on ClipQuiz.

sections.title: What is ClipQuiz?
sections.body: ClipQuiz is a free online trivia platform where you guess answers from images, cropped close-ups, or short audio clips. You type your answer directly — no multiple choice. After each quiz, you see your percentile rank compared to other players.

sections.title: Do I need an account?
sections.body: No. You can play any quiz immediately without signing up. To create a quiz, simply enter a creator name — no email or password required.

sections.title: How does scoring work?
sections.body: Each question has one or more accepted answers. Answers are checked without spaces and case-insensitively. Partial matches may count depending on the quiz. Your final score is compared against all previous players to calculate your percentile rank.

sections.title: What quiz modes are available?
sections.body: Image Quiz: see a full picture and type the answer. Crop Challenge: only a tiny zoomed portion is shown. Audio Clip: hear a few seconds of audio and name the song or sound. Not all quizzes use all three modes.

sections.title: How do I create a quiz?
sections.body: Click "Create" in the navigation, fill in the title and description, add at least 3 questions with image URLs or YouTube links, and publish. Share the quiz link with friends or on social media.

sections.title: Can I use any image in my quiz?
sections.body: You must only use images you own or have permission to use. Do not upload copyrighted photos, movie posters, album covers, or celebrity images without authorization. See our Community Guidelines and Copyright Policy for details.

sections.title: How do I report a problematic quiz?
sections.body: Click the "Report Quiz" button on any quiz page, select a reason, and submit. Reports are handled automatically — no manual review required.

sections.title: Is ClipQuiz free?
sections.body: Yes, ClipQuiz is completely free to play and create quizzes. The site is supported by advertising through Google AdSense.

sections.title: What languages are supported?
sections.body: The interface is available in English, Korean, Japanese, Spanish, and Portuguese. Quiz content is primarily in English, but answer matching supports multiple languages and alternate spellings.

sections.title: How is my privacy protected?
sections.body: We collect minimal data — quiz content you create, play scores, and technical logs. We do not require personal information. See our Privacy Policy for full details on cookies, advertising, and your rights.

guidelines.title: Community Guidelines
guidelines.intro: ClipQuiz is a community platform. These guidelines help keep it safe, legal, and fun for everyone. They apply to all user-created quizzes.

sections.title: Respect Others
sections.body: Do not create quizzes containing hate speech, harassment, threats, bullying, or content targeting individuals or groups based on race, ethnicity, religion, gender, sexual orientation, disability, or national origin.

sections.title: Copyright and Intellectual Property
sections.body:
Only upload content you created or have explicit permission to use. Do not use:

• Copyrighted music, movie stills, or TV screenshots
• Celebrity photographs without authorization
• Brand logos used in a misleading way
• Content from other quiz sites without permission

Educational use of public-domain images and facts is encouraged. When in doubt, use your own photos or Wikimedia Commons media.

User submissions in Music, Movies, Anime, and Memes categories are blocked automatically due to high copyright risk.

sections.title: No Harmful Content
sections.body:
Prohibited content includes:

• Sexually explicit material or child sexual abuse material (CSAM)
• Graphic violence or gore
• Instructions for illegal activities
• Malware links or phishing attempts
• Spam, scams, or misleading quizzes

sections.title: Accurate and Fair Quizzes
sections.body:
Write clear questions with fair accepted answers. Include common alternate spellings. Do not create trick questions designed to mislead players. Add hints when answers may be ambiguous.

For crop questions, use a zoom level between 18% and 75% so players can reasonably guess.

sections.title: Image and Link Rules
sections.body:
Use direct https:// image URLs only. Social media hotlinks (Instagram, Pinterest, TikTok, etc.) are not allowed.

Audio questions are paused until our copyright review is complete.

sections.title: Enforcement
sections.body:
Quizzes that pass automated checks publish immediately. Violations may result in automatic hiding or removal when reported.

Report violations via the in-app button. Copyright reports may hide a quiz after a single report; other reports hide after multiple reports.

moderation.title: Content Moderation Policy
moderation.intro: ClipQuiz uses automated systems to filter risky content at submission and after reports. No manual approval is required for publishing.

sections.title: 1. Instant Publishing
sections.body:
When you submit a quiz, our server runs automated checks (category, keywords, image URLs, crop settings). If everything passes, your quiz is published immediately and appears on the homepage.

Failed checks return an error so you can fix and resubmit.

sections.title: 2. Automated Checks
sections.body:
On every submission we check:

• Agreement to Terms and Community Guidelines
• Blocked high-risk categories (music, movies, anime, memes)
• Prohibited hate, harassment, and CSAM-related language
• Trademark-heavy references (major brands, celebrities, franchises)
• Valid https image URLs (no social media hotlinks)
• Crop zoom within playable limits (18%–75%)

sections.title: 3. Editorial Seed Content
sections.body: Quizzes created by the ClipQuiz team use public-domain images, Wikimedia Commons media, country flags, and NASA imagery. These are curated separately from user submissions.

sections.title: 4. Automated Report Handling
sections.body:
When users report a quiz:

• Copyright reports: quiz may be hidden from the homepage after 1 report
• Other reports: hidden after 3 reports
• Deleted after 5 reports

No manual review is required. Direct quiz links may still work until deletion.

sections.title: 5. Repeat Violations
sections.body: Users who repeatedly submit infringing or harmful content may have quizzes auto-deleted when report thresholds are reached.

sections.title: 6. Appeals
sections.body: If you believe your quiz was hidden or removed in error, email jwon9798@gmail.com with the quiz title and explanation.

sections.title: 7. How This Compares
sections.body: Like Machugi.io and similar platforms, ClipQuiz publishes passing quizzes immediately and relies on automated filters plus user reports for enforcement. ClipQuiz adds stricter upfront filters (blocked categories, trademark checks) before content goes live.

copyright.title: Copyright Policy
copyright.intro: ClipQuiz respects intellectual property rights and responds to valid copyright complaints.

sections.title: Our Content
sections.body: Quiz sets created by the ClipQuiz editorial team use public-domain images, country flags (via flagcdn.com), Wikimedia Commons media, and NASA public-domain imagery. We make good-faith efforts to use properly licensed content.

sections.title: User-Generated Content
sections.body: Users who create quizzes represent that they own or have permission to use all uploaded content. Quizzes that pass automated validation publish immediately. ClipQuiz responds to reports and valid copyright complaints automatically or via email.

sections.title: DMCA Takedown Notice
sections.body:
If you believe content on ClipQuiz infringes your copyright, send a notice to jwon9798@gmail.com including:

1. Your full name and contact information
2. Identification of the copyrighted work claimed to be infringed
3. The URL of the infringing quiz on ClipQuiz
4. A statement that you have a good-faith belief the use is not authorized
5. A statement, under penalty of perjury, that the information is accurate and you are the copyright owner or authorized agent
6. Your physical or electronic signature

We will remove or disable access to the material and notify the quiz creator when appropriate.

sections.title: Counter-Notification
sections.body: If you believe your quiz was removed in error, you may submit a counter-notification to jwon9798@gmail.com with your contact information, identification of the removed content, a statement under penalty of perjury that removal was a mistake, and your consent to jurisdiction of the courts of Seoul, South Korea.

sections.title: Repeat Infringers
sections.body: We terminate quiz creation privileges for users who repeatedly infringe copyrights after receiving valid notices.

guide.title: How to Play ClipQuiz
guide.intro: A complete guide to playing, scoring, and creating quizzes on ClipQuiz.

sections.title: Getting Started
sections.body: Visit the homepage and browse trending quizzes or filter by category. Click any quiz card to open it. No sign-up is needed — just pick a quiz and start playing.

sections.title: Choosing Question Count
sections.body: When you open a quiz, select how many questions to play: 5, 10, 15, 20, or all available. Questions are randomly selected from the quiz pool, so each playthrough feels different.

sections.title: Answering Questions
sections.body: Read or view the question, then type your answer in the text field. Press Enter or tap Submit. Answers are checked without spaces and are case-insensitive. If your answer is close enough to an accepted answer, it counts as correct. Use hints if you are stuck.

sections.title: Image Quiz Mode
sections.body: You see a full photograph or image. Identify the subject — a country flag, landmark, animal, painting, or object — and type your answer. This is the most straightforward mode and great for geography and nature quizzes.

sections.title: Crop Challenge Mode
sections.body: Only a small cropped portion of an image is shown, heavily zoomed in. You must recognize the subject from minimal visual information. Look for colors, textures, and shapes. This mode is significantly harder and more exciting.

sections.title: Audio Clip Mode
sections.body: A short audio clip plays (typically from a YouTube source in user-created quizzes). Listen carefully and type the name of the song, artist, or sound. You can replay the clip before answering.

sections.title: Understanding Your Score
sections.body: After completing a quiz, you see your score (correct out of total) and your percentile rank. "Top 10%" means you scored better than 90% of all players. Share your result on social media to challenge friends.

sections.title: Creating Your Own Quiz
sections.body: Go to Create in the navigation. Add a title, description, category, and at least 3 questions. For each question, choose image, crop, or audio type, provide the media URL, and list accepted answers (one per line, up to 5). Preview your questions, agree to the Community Guidelines, and publish. Share the link with anyone.

sections.title: Tips for High Scores
sections.body:
• Read hints before guessing
• For crop mode, think about color patterns and context
• For flags, learn distinctive shapes and colors
• Try quizzes in categories you know well first
• Play the same quiz again — random question subsets mean new challenges each time
